text.title: OKR Cascade for Multi-Squad Product Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure for applying okr cascade for multi-squad product end-to-end.

step.name: draft-company-okrs
step.action: Head of Product publishes 2-3 company-level Objectives + KRs.

step.name: draft-squad-okrs
step.action: Each squad drafts 1 O + 3-5 KRs; each KR traces to >=1 company KR.
step.decision-gate: If squad cannot trace KRs to company, surface the gap in alignment review.

step.name: build-dependency-graph
step.action: Run cascade-graph-author (sonnet) to extract cross-squad deliverables.
step.decision-gate: Each edge has by_date; reject edges without dates.

step.name: sign-and-publish
step.action: Each squad PM signs the squad OKR + all incoming/outgoing edges.
step.decision-gate: If any edge has unresolved disputes, block sign and escalate.

step.name: operate-cadence
step.action: Run weekly check-ins (confidence 0-10 + top blocker); post-quarter retro with cause tags.
step.output: Operating cadence + retro feeding next quarter.
step.decision-gate: Auto-escalate squads with 2 consecutive missed check-ins.
